## Problem / Motivation

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
     e.g. "I'm always frustrated when I can't see X because..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.
     Which tab would it live in? What would it display? How would a user interact with it? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought about other ways to solve this? Why is your approach better? -->

## Implementation Notes

<!-- Optional: any technical details, API endpoints, data formats, or mockups that might help. -->

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] I can help with parts of it
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it
